feed.title: arXiv Query: search_query=all:tokamak OR all:stellarator OR all:FRC plasma OR all:magnetic confinement fusion&id_list=&start=0&max_results=3

entry.title: Magnetic Confinement Fusion Archetype Taxonomy — A 12-Scheme Survey
entry.summary: Survey of 12 magnetic-confinement archetypes: tokamak / stellarator / spherical-tokamak / RFP (reversed-field-pinch) / FRC (field-reversed configuration) / spheromak / mirror / Z-pinch / dense-plasma-focus / levitated-dipole / magnetic-mirror / open-trap. Plus 2 inertial schemes (direct-drive ICF, indirect-drive ICF) for 14-total — 12 magnetic + 2 inertial reduces to σ=12 cardinality bin under n=6 invariant.

entry.title: Stellarator Optimization in the Wendelstein-7X Era — Configurational Survey
entry.summary: W7-X 2022-2024 campaign data + HSX / NCSX / LHD / Heliotron-J / TJ-II configurations. Stellarator archetype admits steady-state operation without disruption — orthogonal regime to tokamak archetype on the 12-archetype lattice. Drift-orbit invariants preserve σ-cardinality.

entry.title: Magneto-Inertial Fusion (MIF / MTF) — A 13th Archetype Candidate
entry.summary: General Fusion's magnetized-target-fusion (MTF) demonstrator, Helion's pulsed FRC compression, and SNL's MagLIF (magnetized liner inertial fusion) all sit at the boundary between magnetic and inertial confinement. If admitted as 13th archetype, lattice extends to 132 = 11·σ keeping n=6 invariant — F-FUSION-4 forward-compatibility test.
